site.title: MobiGlas OS
site.subtitle: Tools & Links for Star Citizen
site.tagline: A curated directory of the best tools, websites and resources for the 'Verse.

categoryDesc.ships-gear: Loadout planners, ship databases and component specs.
categoryDesc.trade-logistics: Commodity prices, trade routes and cargo planning.
categoryDesc.databases: Raw game data, item indexes and references.
categoryDesc.wikis-lore: Community wikis, lore archives and Galactapedia.
categoryDesc.org-fleet: Org platforms, fleet management and recruitment.

hub.intro: Browse by category, or search across everything.

favorites.empty: No favorites yet — tap the star on a tool to save it.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.tagline: This directory is community-driven. Adding a tool takes a minute — no coding required.
contribute.easyText: Open a short pre-filled form and submit. A maintainer reviews and adds it.
contribute.devText: Comfortable with Git? Add the entry yourself in data.json and the README, then open a PR.

footer.disclaimer: Star Citizen and all related assets are © Cloud Imperium Games. This project is unofficial and not affiliated with CIG.

prison.title: Prison Time Calculator
prison.subtitle: Klescher sentence reduction
prison.tagline: Work out how much ore you need to mine to clear your sentence — or how much time a given haul will shave off.
prison.disclaimer: ⚠️ Approximate figures only. 1 merit = 1 second; the merit value of each ore comes from community data and is not official — CIG can retune it between patches, so treat the results as a rough estimate.
